summary: Frontend testing iteration 6 - 7 out of 8 features verified working. One minor issue found: duplicate apps with different casing (Line/LINE) in Thailand modal.

ui_bugs.issue: Case-insensitive duplicate apps - 'Line' and 'LINE' both appear in Thailand modal
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Update deduplication filter to use case-insensitive comparison: `rawApps.filter((app, index, self) => index === self.findIndex(a => a.app_name.toLowerCase() === app.app_name.toLowerCase()))`

passed_tests: Festival cards show proper festival names (e.g., 'Galungan', 'Chinese New Year', 'Republic Day') NOT just country names
Festival page shows 117 festivals with proper names using festival.festival_name || festival.name
Country Detail Modal shows 'Crowd & Cost Insights' section with Busiest/Least Busy/Expensive/Budget-Friendly months
Thailand modal: Busiest: Nov, Dec, Jan, Feb | Least Busy: May, Jun, Sep | Expensive: Dec, Jan, Feb | Budget-Friendly: May, Jun, Sep, Oct
FOREX section shows interchange symbol (↔) between currencies (ArrowRightLeft icon)
Visa section shows 'Check Eligibility' and 'Document Checklist' links with correct data-testids
Cost Estimator has month selector with all 12 months (Jan-Dec) visible
Cost Estimator has prev/next month navigation buttons
Cost Estimator shows seasonal pricing indicator: '⚖️ Shoulder Season (Regular prices)' for March
Cost Estimator shows '🔥 Peak Season (+25% costs)' for December
Cost Estimator shows '💰 Off Season (-20% costs)' for June
Cost Estimator result shows selected month (December) and season type (Peak Season)
Japan modal apps are unique: Hyperdia, PayPay, Tabelog, JNTO Guide (no duplicates)
failed_tests: Thailand modal has case-insensitive duplicate apps: 'Line' (Convenience) and 'LINE' (Convenience)
action_items: Fix case-insensitive duplicate apps in CountryDetailModal.js - change line 187-188 to use case-insensitive comparison
critical_code_review_comments: CountryDetailModal.js line 187-188: Deduplication uses `a.app_name === app.app_name` which is case-sensitive. Should be `a.app_name.toLowerCase() === app.app_name.toLowerCase()` to prevent 'Line' vs 'LINE' duplicates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 main features verified: (1) Festival names use festival_name || name correctly, (2) Crowd & Cost Insights section added with travelTimingData, (3) FOREX interchange symbol (ArrowRightLeft icon) visible, (4) App deduplication working but case-sensitive - needs case-insensitive fix, (5) Visa eligibility/checklist links added, (6) Cost Estimator has 12 month selector with navigation, (7) Seasonal pricing indicators (+25%/-20%/regular) showing in form and result.

features_verified.festival_names: Using festival.festival_name || festival.name || 'Festival' - shows proper names like 'Galungan', 'Chinese New Year'
features_verified.crowd_cost_insights: New section with Busiest/Least Busy/Expensive/Budget-Friendly months using travelTimingData object
features_verified.forex_interchange: ArrowRightLeft icon between currency values (e.g., 1 THB ↔ ₹0.34)
features_verified.app_deduplication: PARTIAL - filters by app_name but case-sensitive (Line vs LINE issue)
features_verified.visa_links: Check Eligibility and Document Checklist links with data-testid attributes
features_verified.month_selector: 12 months visible (Jan-Dec) with prev/next navigation buttons
features_verified.seasonal_pricing: Peak (+25%), Off (-20%), Shoulder (regular) indicators in form and result
